projectDescription: A web-scale 3D data visualization and streaming platform that enables engineering teams to view, share, and interact with massive CAD assemblies on any device in real time — no conversions, no exports, no client installs.
keyFeatures: Real-time 3D streaming of massive CAD assemblies with up to 99% faster initial load
Zero client footprint — works in any browser on any device with no installs
Direct PLM/PDM integration as single source of truth (no exports or conversions)
3DSpaces for persistent, real-time collaborative sessions with annotations, measurements, and clip planes
webvisAPI JavaScript library for building custom 3D applications
Unreal Engine plugin for immersive VR/AR experiences
Data Gateway for connecting external 3D data sources via standard HTTP
Hub Mesh for distributing 3D data across multiple instant3Dhub instances
Support for CATIA V5, STEP, IFC, GLTF, VRML, and more
AI platform (MCP Server) for connecting AI assistants to 3D engineering data
publicApiSurface: webvisAPI — JavaScript client library (requestContext, getContext, getContexts, removeContext)
AnimationAPI, AnnotationAPI, ClipPlaneAPI, MeasurementAPI, SnapshotProperties, SpaceAPI, TopologyAPI, ViewerAPI
webvisUI API — setSetting, getSetting, addContextMenuEntries, notifyInfo/Warning/Error, translate
Resource API — REST interface for 3D resource access and management
Data Gateway API — HTTP REST interface for connecting external 3D data backends
3DSpaces API — OpenAPI-based experimental REST interface for service-to-service communication
License Server API — REST interface for license management
Unreal Plugin API — ConnectToHub(), Disconnect(), IsConnectedToHub(), Blueprint Actions
MCP Server — Model Context Protocol integration for AI assistants
